description_long: This sculpture depicts a robed human figure, possibly representing a religious or historical character, standing upright with a bowed head and one arm bent across the chest. The figure is draped in a long, flowing cloak that covers most of the body, with subtle folds and creases adding texture to the garment. The facial features are softly defined, and the head is slightly inclined forward, suggesting a contemplative or solemn pose. The back of the sculpture is smooth and largely featureless, emphasizing the drapery of the cloak. The base is irregular and appears to be integrated with the figure, providing stability. The surface is predominantly gray with some lighter patches, and the material appears to be stone or concrete, giving it a weathered, durable appearance.
description: A gray stone or concrete sculpture of a robed human figure with a bowed head and draped cloak, standing on an irregular base. The figure's pose is contemplative and solemn, with detailed folds in the garment.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bowed head, facial features, and the arm bent across the chest, with detailed folds in the cloak.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the draped cloak and the forward inclination of the head, with the arm partially visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, featureless back of the cloak and the full length of the garment.
description_view_3: Right side view emphasizing the elongated drapery and the downward tilt of the head, with minimal detail on the arm.
attribute_location_context: No specific setting or environment is visible in the images; the background is isolated and neutral.
